financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company made a lot more money than expected in the recent quarter.
They grew in different areas and didn't have any big problems, except for some minor financial adjustments.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is handling risks well, but tea and coffee prices are unpredictable due to global events.
While the company is growing in the US, tariffs are making it harder to meet their goals.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Average
bullets: The company is doing okay with its environmental and social responsibilities but has room for improvement.
They are meeting some standards but not going above and beyond in their efforts.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company's leaders spoke with confidence about their strong financial results and future plans.
They showed they are ready to handle challenges and take advantage of new opportunities.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Average
bullets: The company shared some clear details about their operations and goals.
They were unclear about pricing and profits, often giving general answers instead of exact numbers.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Average
bullets: The company is doing well and leaders are confident about their plans for the future.
There are some challenges like tariffs and tea market share, but overall things look positive.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing well because it's growing in new areas like food and drinks, not just tea and salt.
There are some risks, like US tariffs and lower profits from one brand, but overall the company is managing costs effectively.
